repo.description: Marketing site for MonGPT, an AI chatbot and voice support agent targeting Asian-language markets. Static Next.js export on Cloudflare Pages with 30+ free SEO tools, docs hub, and 8 locale variants with geo-redirect.

cards.title: Add security headers and rate limiting in middleware
cards.rationale: functions/_middleware.js only does geo-redirect; no CSP, HSTS, or API throttling.
bullets: Add CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options headers to all responses
Rate-limit /api/demo/* calls per IP in Cloudflare worker
Add CORS restrictions for demo API endpoints

cards.title: Add unit tests for markdown converters
cards.rationale: Pure functions in toMarkdown.ts have zero coverage and no test framework is installed.
bullets: Install vitest, add tests for htmlToMarkdown and csvToMarkdown
Cover edge cases: empty input, malformed JSON/XML, large files
Run tests in prebuild step alongside render-prompt.mjs

cards.title: Add mobile navigation drawer to header
cards.rationale: Header.tsx hides nav with hidden md:flex; mobile users cannot browse the site.
bullets: Add hamburger button toggle in Header.tsx
Create slide-out drawer with all nav links
Include locale switcher and CTA in drawer

cards.title: Surface live chatbot demo on homepage
cards.rationale: DemoWidget.tsx exists but is never rendered; competitors show live demos above the fold.
bullets: Import and render DemoWidget in HomePage.tsx hero section
Add multilingual sample prompts (Hindi, Tamil, Chinese)
Show chat transcript preview for no-JS visitors

cards.title: Add competitor comparison pages
cards.rationale: Tidio and Intercom capture high-intent vs-search traffic with dedicated comparison pages.
bullets: Create /compare/[slug] dynamic route for vs pages
Add MonGPT vs Tidio, Intercom, Chatra comparison data
Link comparison pages from Footer and pricing page

cards.title: Add trending tools showcase section
cards.rationale: 30+ free tools lack social proof; a trending section drives discovery and engagement.
bullets: Add trending tools grid to ToolsIndex.tsx landing
Tag tools by popularity tier in tools.ts
Add 'most used this week' badge component
